name: Templar Assassin
description: Where the Hidden Ones send me, I go without question. I do not even question why I question not.

abilities.name: Refraction
abilities.description: Grants all damage barrier instances that negates damage. Both the damage negation component and the bonus attack damage component have a limited number of instances and are independent of each other. Grants Lanaya bonus attack damage while refracting. Damage Negation Threshold: 30. Duration: 17. Max Attack Charges: 3/4/5/6 (7/8/9/10). Duration: 30. Attack Damage Bonus: 15/30/45/60 (19/34/49/64). Mana Cost: 14.

abilities.name: Meld
abilities.description: Attack Damage / Physical Meld now applies a self-basic dispel upon cast. Fade Time: 0 Invisibility Duration:. Fade Time: 0. Attack Damage Instance: 50/100/150/200. Armor Reduction: 2/4/6/8 (5/7/9/11). Debuff Duration: 6 (7.5). Bash Duration: (0.8). Cooldown: 11/9/7/5. Mana Cost: 35/40/45/50.

abilities.name: Psi Blades
abilities.description: Grants self bonus attack range. Area Width: 90. Spill Length: 400/500/600/700. Attack Damage to Spill Damage Factor: 0.7/0.8/0.9/1. Attack Range Bonus: 50/100/150/200.

abilities.name: Psionic Projection
abilities.description: Teleports Lanaya to the nearest Psionic Trap after channeling and detonates it upon arrival, damaging and slowing enemy units around it. Cast Range: Global. Channel Time: 2. Effect Radius: 400. Damage: 400. Move Speed Slow: 50% (60%). Slow Duration: 5. Mana Cost: 10.

abilities.name: Psionic Trap
abilities.description: Increases max Psionic Trap count and its vision radius. Cast Range: 1800. Fade Time: 2. Hit Count: 1. Hit Count: 2. Vision Radius: 250 (375) Duration:. Vision Radius: 250 (375). Cooldown: 11/8/5. Mana Cost: 15.
